resultList.dtldesc: Own a modern home in one of North Bangalore's rapidly developing residential corridors with this thoughtfully designed 2 BHK apartment in Godrej Ananda, Bagaluru. Developed by the reputed Godrej Properties, this residence combines contemporary design, quality construction and a promising location, making it an excellent choice for both homebuyers and investors.::::Property Specifications::::Situated on the 9th floor of a 28-storey residential tower, this apartment offers a super built-up area of 998 sq. ft and is designed to provide a comfortable and efficient living experience. The well-planned layout comprises 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms and a balcony that enhances natural ventilation and allows ample daylight to flow into the living spaces.::::The apartment is offered in an unfurnished condition, giving buyers the flexibility to design and furnish the interiors according to their personal preferences and lifestyle needs. The spacious living and dining areas are thoughtfully arranged to maximise functionality, while the bedrooms ensure privacy and comfort for family members. The north-facing orientation is considered favourable and contributes to a pleasant indoor environment.::::As an under-construction property, this apartment presents an excellent opportunity to own a home in a premium township with strong future appreciation potential. The freehold ownership further adds long-term value and peace of mind for prospective buyers.::::Facilities::::Being part of the prestigious Godrej Ananda development, residents can look forward to a professionally planned community with modern infrastructure and lifestyle-oriented amenities. The project is designed to offer a balanced living environment with landscaped spaces, recreational facilities and essential conveniences that cater to the needs of contemporary urban families.::::Locality::::Bagaluru has emerged as one of North Bangalore's most promising residential destinations due to its proximity to Kempegowda International Airport and major employment hubs. The locality enjoys excellent connectivity through well-developed road networks, making travel to various parts of the city convenient. Reputed educational institutions, healthcare centres, supermarkets, shopping destinations and daily conveniences are easily accessible from the project.::::The area's ongoing infrastructure development and growing residential demand make it a preferred destination for both end-users and investors. Combining the credibility of Godrej Properties, a strategic location and modern living spaces, this apartment offers a valuable opportunity to own a home in a fast-growing part of Bangalore.
